name: Scallops in Wine (Nz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and drain the scallops, then slice up the mushrooms.
2. Separate the white parts from the yolks of the eggs and lightly beat the yolks.
3. Place the scallops in a bowl, cover with wine, and allow them to soak for 15 minutes, adding a bay leaf.
4. Season to taste and cook in the wine at a low heat for 15 minutes.
5. Remove the scallops from the wine and drain them, placing them in a warming dish. Retain the marinade.
6. Fry the mushrooms in butter at a low heat, stirring constantly.
7. Bring the marinade to a boil and add half a teaspoonful of butter. Thicken with the egg yolks.
8. Combine with the mushrooms and scallops and douse in the wine sauce.
9. Serve on a bed of bread fried in butter and garnish with parsley and lemon. Serves 4
SOURCE: Kiwi Cookbook, by Alan Armstrong, Seven Seas Publishing Pty Ltd, PO Box 1431, Wellington, New Zealand, (C. 1968) ISBN 85467 016 5 SHARED BY: Jim Bodle 5/93
